'''Skeel''' was a muscled young [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]]. He was the leader of the [[Techrats|Band of Techrats]], along with [[Kordren (Cerean)|Kordren]] and [[Maj-Odo-Nomor]].

==Biography==
As followers of [[Bron (Human)|Bron's]] ProTech movement, Skeel denied against the iron attitude of the Cerean Elders and eventually joined the [[Techrats|Band of Techrats]] along with his girlfriend [[Twin (Cerean)|Twin]].

In [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], Skeel painted his face in order to hide his identity as a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] rider. During a race, Skeel lost control of his swoop and crashed into a façade of a building which ultimately killed him.
